name: The Hague (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the gold of the city's traditional civic colours
the green of the city's traditional civic colours

description: A horizontal bicolour of yellow over green, in equal widths.
history: Adopted by The Hague's municipal council on 13 June 1928; the yellow-and-green colours are the city's traditional civic colours, dating back to at least 1395.

features.symbolism: the city's traditional gold-and-green civic colours
